EXAMPLE 9: 

The parent of a dependent disabled child has been discharged from the hospital following 
a hip replacement. Although arrangements for care of the disabled child during the 
hospitalization were made, the child has returned to the home. During a visit to the 
patient, the nurse observes that the patient is transferring the child from bed to a 
wheelchair. In an effort to avoid impeding the patient's recovery, the nurse contacts the 
patient's physician to order
